---
title: Tofu au beurre

categories:
  - Mijotés
  - Plats principaux
  - Réconfortantes
  - Végétalien
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">
<div class="recipe-toolbar-main">
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Ftofu-beurre.yaml" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">✏️ Modifier</a>
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Ftofu-beurre.yaml&quick=comment" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">💬 + Commentaire</a>
</div>
<div class="recipe-toolbar-actions">
<button id="recipe-cart-toggle" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm">🛒 Mettre au panier</button>
<button id="recipe-reading-mode" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">🍳 Mode cuisine</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="recipe-facts-grid"><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Source</span><strong><a href="https://bonpourtoi.ca/recettes/tofu-au-beurre/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">bonpourtoi.ca</a></strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Se congèle</span><strong>Non</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps préparation</span><strong>15 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps cuisson</span><strong>20 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps réfrigération</span><strong>0 min</strong></div></div>

```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/repas/tofu-beurre.qmd","title":"Tofu au beurre","url":"/recettes/repas/tofu-beurre.qmd","portions_base":4,"portions_target":4,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Farine tout usage","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Garam masala","uni":"c. à thé","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poudre de cari","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Cumin","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Gingembre moulu","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Tofu ferme en cubes","uni":"g","qte":454,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"Huile végétale","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Huile végétale","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Oignon haché","uni":"moyen","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Ail haché","uni":"gousse","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Gingembre frais haché","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Garam masala","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poudre de cari","uni":"c. à thé","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.5,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poivre","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.5,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Lait de coco","uni":"ml","qte":398,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"Pâte de tomates","uni":"ml","qte":156,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="4" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 4</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="recipe-nutrition-section">
<h2>Valeurs nutritives</h2>
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>62 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>0 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>0,2 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>6,9 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 4.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 4.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="248.73" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">249 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="248.73" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">62 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.1908" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,2 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.1908" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="27.615" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">27,6 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="27.615" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">6,9 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="4.32207" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">4,3 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="4.32207" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1,1 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.9918" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.9918" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.03" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.03" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fibres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.063" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.063" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="969.46" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">969 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="969.46" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">242 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="12.23" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">12 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="12.23" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">3 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="6.03" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">6 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="6.03" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">2 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.07305" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.07305" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Magnésium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.775" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.775" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Zinc</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.04006" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.04006" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.4285" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,4 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.4285" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,1 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.936" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,9 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.936" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,2 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine B12</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine A (EAR)</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (13)</summary><ul><li><code>Farine tout usage</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Garam masala</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poudre de cari</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Cumin</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Gingembre moulu</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Tofu ferme en cubes</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Oignon haché</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Gingembre frais haché</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Garam masala</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poudre de cari</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poivre</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Lait de coco</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Pâte de tomates</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li></ul></details></details></div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

## Ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-grocery-actions">
<button id="copy-grocery-list" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">📋 Générer la liste d'épicerie</button>
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Tofu au beurre

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Farine tout usage" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="7.605" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Farine tout usage</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Garam masala" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Garam masala</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre de cari" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre de cari</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cumin" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cumin</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Gingembre moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Gingembre moulu</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Tofu ferme en cubes" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="454" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="454">454</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Tofu ferme en cubes</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.8" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Sauce pour le tofu au beurre

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.8" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Oignon haché" data-ingredient-unit="moyen" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">moyen</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Oignon haché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Ail haché" data-ingredient-unit="gousse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">gousse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Ail haché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Gingembre frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Gingembre frais haché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Garam masala" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Garam masala</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre de cari" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre de cari</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="3.0425" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Lait de coco" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="409.94" data-base-volume-ml="398" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="398">398</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Lait de coco</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Pâte de tomates" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="156" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="156">156</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Pâte de tomates</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Tofu au beurre

- Bol
- Poêle antiadhésive

### Sauce pour le tofu au beurre

- Poêle antiadhésive

## Préparation

### Tofu au beurre

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Farine tout usage" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="7.605" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Farine tout usage</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Garam masala" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Garam masala</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre de cari" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre de cari</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cumin" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cumin</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Gingembre moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="1.25" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Gingembre moulu</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Tofu ferme en cubes" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="454" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="454">454</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Tofu ferme en cubes</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans un bol, mélanger la farine, le garam masala, la poudre de cari, le cumin et le gingembre moulu. Ajouter le tofu en dés et mélanger pour que chaque cube soit bien recouvert du mélange.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.8" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Dans une poêle antiadhésive, chauffer l’huile à feu moyen et cuire les morceaux de tofu environ 5 minutes ou jusqu’à ce qu’il devienne croustillant. Réserver le tofu dans un bol.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="300">⏱️ 5 min</button></div></div></article>
</div>
```

### Sauce pour le tofu au beurre

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.8" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Oignon haché" data-ingredient-unit="moyen" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">moyen</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Oignon haché</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Ail haché" data-ingredient-unit="gousse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">gousse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Ail haché</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Gingembre frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Gingembre frais haché</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans la même poêle chaude ayant servi à la cuisson du tofu, chauffer l’huile à feu moyen et cuire l’oignon jusqu’à ce que celui-ci soit translucide. Ajouter l’ail et le gingembre frais et cuire 2 minutes.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="120">⏱️ 2 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Garam masala" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Garam masala</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre de cari" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre de cari</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="3.0425" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Lait de coco" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="409.94" data-base-volume-ml="398" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="398">398</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Lait de coco</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Pâte de tomates" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="156" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="156">156</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Pâte de tomates</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Incorporer ensuite les épices, le lait de coco et la pâte de tomates. Porter le tout à ébullition. Réduire à feu moyen et mijoter 5 minutes.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="300">⏱️ 5 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Ajouter les petits cubes de tofu à la sauce crémeuse et laisser mijoter 10 minutes. Servir immédiatement et accompagner de pain naan ou de riz au jasmin.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="600">⏱️ 10 min</button></div></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=4;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;let mode=(localStorage.getItem(modeKey)==='mass')?'mass':'volume';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const isKitchenUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='tasse'||n==='t'||n==='c a soupe'||n==='cuillere a soupe'||n==='cuilleres a soupe'||n==='c a table'||n==='c s'||n==='c.s.'||n==='c a the'||n==='cuillere a the'||n==='cuilleres a the'||n==='c t'||n==='c.t.';};const chooseKitchenUnit=(volumeMl,explicit)=>{if(isKitchenUnit(explicit)) return explicit; if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return 'c. à thé'; if(volumeMl>=125) return 'tasse'; if(volumeMl>=7.5) return 'c. à soupe'; return 'c. à thé';};const chooseImperialMassUnit=(massG,explicit)=>{const e=normalize(explicit); if(e==='once'||e==='onces'||e==='oz') return 'onces'; if(e==='lb'||e==='lbs') return 'lbs'; if(!Number.isFinite(massG)) return 'lbs'; return massG<453.59237?'onces':'lbs';};const setDerived=(label,qNode,uNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); if(!qNode||!label) return false; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitMass=li.dataset.explicitMass==='1'; const explicitVolume=li.dataset.explicitVolume==='1'; const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const explicitUnitVolume=li.dataset.explicitUnitVolume||'ml'; let qty=NaN; let unit=''; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} qNode.textContent=format(qty); if(uNode){uNode.textContent=unit;} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', unit); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(label,qNode,uNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs');};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```
